title: Tailwind 4 Surface Theming Generator
description: Generates Tailwind 4 compatible CSS from your Ethlete surface theme definitions

themesPath.description: Path to your surface themes file (relative to workspace root)
themesPath.x-prompt: Where is your surface themes file located?

outputPath.description: Where to output the generated Tailwind surface themes CSS
outputPath.x-prompt: Where should the generated CSS be saved?

prefix.description: Prefix for surface variable names (e.g., 'et' creates --color-et-surface-*)
